prompt:
Theme direction: Oriental Zen minimalist poster
Style branch: High-contrast seasonal type
Main subject: A figure slowly walking up a long staircase
Emotional motif: Clear autumn day, upward momentum, vitality within stillness
Scenes and imagery: Lemon-yellow gingko leaves, indigo-blue staircase shadows, cool white walls, character silhouette
Composition and space: Deep composition, staircase extending upwards, character located in the lower-middle part, gingko leaves dotting the steps and negative space areas
Color control: Cool white as the wall and background base, indigo blue for staircase shadows and spatial layers, lemon yellow for gingko leaf highlights, ink gray for character outlines; avoid yellow tint across the entire image
Light and texture: Bright natural light, light paper feel, clear edges, small amount of grain
Aspect ratio: 9:16
Additional requirements: The steps should be minimalist, gingko leaves should be few but striking, overall light and transparent
